task: Write a Python function that validates AWS S3 bucket names according to AWS naming rules: 3-63 characters, lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only, must start and end with letter or number, no consecutive hyphens, and cannot be formatted as IP address

Create a regex pattern that matches valid AWS IAM role ARNs in the format: arn:aws:iam::ACCOUNT_ID:role/ROLE_NAME where ACCOUNT_ID is 12 digits and ROLE_NAME contains alphanumeric characters, hyphens, and forward slashes
